reviews.comment:
Mi querido MAQUINCHAO ❤️ sigue teniendo gente bonita por dentro y por fuera. Excelente atención. Un amor de persona el dueño. Gracias, gracias. 🥰❤️

(Translated by Google)
My beloved Maquinchao ❤️ continues to have beautiful people inside and out. Excellent service. The owner is a sweetheart. Thank you, thank you. 🥰❤️
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1988985900989530919/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURYLW9fMFdREAE

reviews.comment:
Mejoró todo y se nota! Muy buenos servicios básicos para hacer noche en el camino. El servicio es playa de combustibles y "Full" es muy bueno.
Muy bueno el desayuno, excelente el café y sus distintas varientes: muy bien preparadas.Las habitaciones son sencillas pero impecables y suficientes para descansar. Siempre hacemos noche aquí. 👍👍👍👍👍

(Translated by Google)
Everything has improved, and it shows! Very good basic services for an overnight stay on the road. The service is at the fuel station, and "Full" is very good.
The breakfast is very good, the coffee is excellent, and the various varieties are very well prepared. The rooms are simple but spotless and sufficient for rest. We always stay here. 👍👍👍👍👍
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1988985900989530919/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURCNHAyWXV3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Caro para lo que ofrece. NO hay agua potable en la habitación. La ducha a medida de flacos anoréxicos. 1 solo enchufe para 3 camas. Toallas, camas, atención del personal, bien +, paisaje excelente

(Translated by Google)
Expensive for what it offers. There's no drinking water in the room. The shower is tailor-made for anorexic skinny people. Only one outlet for three beds. Towels, beds, and staff service are all good. Excellent scenery.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1988985900989530919/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURYdXJMcjdRRRAB
